creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

It is worth doing that instead of just removing math/gnuplot+ from the ports
tree?

Upstream claims:
"This package is obsolete. The author does not recommend to use it."

The package also depends on japanese/vflib which is deprecated and has expired.

Do you agree if I just remove the ports from the ports tree?

regards,
Bapt
